dashboardTitle: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Global Security Desk

risks.title: Why is Casemiro unavailable for Inter Miami vs Chicago Fire despite being announced?
risks.description:
Despite being announced on Wednesday, Casemiro won't be able to take part in Inter Miami's clash against the Chicago Fire. 
Casemiro has officially completed his move to Inter Miami following the 2026 World Cup, arriving on a free transfer after his contract …

risks.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup proved that drama sells — no matter the source of the subplot
risks.description: As CBC Sports senior contributor Morgan Campbell writes, organizers witness record viewership during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and it all adds up to money — and new precedents set.

risks.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup Mega-Ritual
risks.description:
A look at the intense symbolism and "coincidences" that occured at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. It was more than sport, it was a mega-ritual.
The post The 2026 FIFA World Cup Mega-Ritual first appeared on Vigilant Citizen.

risks.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup Best XI, Team of the Tournament unveiled: Full list of players
risks.description: FIFA releases its annual Team of the Tournament for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

risks.title: Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister breaks silence after Argentina's World Cup Final controversy
risks.description: Argentina's players were widely condemned for turning their backs on Spain's FIFA World Cup trophy lift after losing the final in extra time, with Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister having now broken his silence on the controversy

risks.title: When is Lionel Messi back for Inter Miami? Projected MLS return date after World Cup 2026 break
risks.description: Lionel Messi came agonizingly close to a second World Cup title, but fell just short as Argentina lost to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final on July 19, and now it's time to rest up for the stretch run of the MLS season.

risks.title: Only ONE England player makes FIFA's 2026 World Cup team of the tournament as fans choose Man United star in defence - and cult hero gets the nod
risks.description: FIFA have only selected one England player in their World Cup team of the tournament.

risks.title: Cristiano Ronaldo still makes soccer world talk for one reason despite falling short of World Cup dream, says Luis Nani
risks.description: While critics pointed to his reduced mobility at the age of 41, Nani offered a different perspective, reminding supporters why Ronaldo remains one of soccer's defining figures. Cristiano Ronaldo may have seen his dream of winning the FIFA World Cup come to an…

risks.title: Fan Favourite Vozinha Headlines FIFA World Cup Dream XI
risks.description: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha and Norway striker Erling Haaland have been named in the fan-voted FIFA World Cup dream team, with both rewarded for standout performances during unexpected runs by their teams.

risks.title: Cape Verde’s Vozinha makes list as FIFA unveils World Cup 2026 Best XI
risks.description:
FIFA has unveiled its official 2026 FIFA World Cup Team of the Tournament, with newly crowned champions Spain providing the highest number of players in the star-studded XI.
The post Cape Verde’s Vozinha makes list as FIFA unveils World Cup 2026 Best XI appea…

risks.title: Rogers customers used hundreds of terabytes of data during Word Cup games
risks.description: Rogers has shared the results of its network performance and experience during the recently completed 2026 FIFA World Cup. According to the carrier, attendees used 510TB of data at the stadiums and at surrounding events like watch parties and fan zones across…

risks.title: World Cup 2026 Turns Sport Into a Community Stage
risks.description: Spain and Argentina will meet in the 2026 World Cup final on July 19 in East Rutherford, but by now the tournament has already seeped into places far from that stadium. With 16 host cities across Canada, Mexico, and the United States, the expanded 48-team for…

risks.title: Barcelona market value update: Lamine remains at the top at €220m; Cubarsi breaks €100m barrier
risks.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has come to an end, but its impact continues to be felt in the transfer market. Following the latest Transfermarkt update, several Barcelona players have seen their market valu...

risks.title: Real Madrid trio make FIFA World Cup Best XI after standout campaigns
risks.description: Real Madrid also got a share of the glory as Spain won the FIFA World Cup 2026, as one of their players, Marc Cucurella, was also present in the winning side. The Merengue club had signed the fullback...

risks.title: Report: Arsenal dream of signing Julian Alvarez amidst tensions between the Argentine and Atletico Madrid
risks.description: According to reports, Arsenal are following Julian Alvarez's situation closely, with the Argentine reportedly close to leaving Atletico Madrid. Europe’s transfer market is picking up pace following the 2026 World Cup, and Julian Alvarez looks set to be one of…
